title: ProviderPluginSetEnabledMethod
description: Contract for providerPlugin.setEnabled JSON-RPC method. Enables or disables a provider plugin at the specified layer by writing to the provider's settings file. User-layer writes rescan global/user facts; project-layer writes rescan the layers needed to resolve Project Detail effective state.

pluginName.description: Plugin name (the part before @ in name@marketplace)

marketplaceName.description: Marketplace name (the part after @ in name@marketplace)

layer.description: Settings layer to write. user writes to the global user settings; project writes to the project-local settings.

projectId.description: Required when layer=project. The project ID whose settings file will be written.

enabled.description: Whether to enable (true) or disable (false) the plugin

ProviderPluginSetEnabledResponse.title: ProviderPluginSetEnabledResponse
ProviderPluginSetEnabledResponse.description: Immediate response — the write and rescan run asynchronously. Errors: validation_error (1001) for unknown/unsupported provider or layer; filesystem_error (1002) if the settings file cannot be written; conflict_error (1005) if a scan or write is already running.

operationId.description: ID of the created write+rescan operation
